---
title: "Inside the M5: As Big as New Jersey"
description: "Think of the state of New Jersey next time you whip out your iPhone."
author: "synesis"
date: "2026-01-19"
categories: [Apple, semiconductor, iPhone, video, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Thumbnail from the MKBHD video. [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jh9pFp1oM7E)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Think of the state of New Jersey next time when you whip out your iPhone [[1]](#ref-1).

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] MKBHD. "I Shrunk Down Into an M5 Chip." *YouTube*. <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jh9pFp1oM7E>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_i-shrunk-down-into-an-m5-chip-activity-7419061032586850304-TPUv).*
